sprite

payloads.hpp

Go to the documentation of this file.
00001 
00005 #pragma once
00006 #include "sprite/common.hpp"
00007 #include "sprite/pointer.hpp"
00008 
00009 namespace sprite
00010 {
00011   static size_t const PAYLOAD_BYTES = 16;
00012 
00013   namespace payloads
00014   {
00016     template<size_t Bytes = PAYLOAD_BYTES>  
00017       struct Unused { char unused[Bytes]; };
00018    
00020     template<size_t N> struct InPlace;
00021 
00023     template<> struct InPlace<0> : Unused<> {};
00024     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(InPlace<0>) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00025 
00027     template<> struct InPlace<1> : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES-1*sizeof(NodePtr*)>
00028     {
00029       NodePtr arg;
00030       InPlace(NodePtr const & arg_) : arg(arg_) {}
00031     };
00032     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(InPlace<1>) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00033 
00035     template<> struct InPlace<2> : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES-2*sizeof(NodePtr*)>
00036     {
00037       NodePtr arg0, arg1;
00038       InPlace(NodePtr const & arg0_, NodePtr const & arg1_)
00039         : arg0(arg0_), arg1(arg1_)
00040       {}
00041     };
00042     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(InPlace<2>) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00043 
00050     struct ChildList : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES - sizeof(size_t) - sizeof(NodePtr*)>
00051     {
00052       ChildList(NodePtr * args, size_t size)
00053         : m_size(size), m_args(new NodePtr[m_size])
00054       {
00055         assert(m_size>2);
00056       }
00057 
00058       ChildList(ChildList const & arg)
00059         : m_size(arg.m_size), m_args(new NodePtr[arg.m_size])
00060       {
00061         std::copy(&arg.m_args[0], &arg.m_args[m_size], &this->m_args[0]);
00062       }
00063 
00064       ChildList & operator=(ChildList const & arg)
00065       {
00066         size_t const size = m_size;
00067         NodePtr * const args = m_args;
00068 
00069         try
00070           { new(this) ChildList(arg); }
00071         catch(...)
00072         {
00073           this->m_size = size;
00074           this->m_args = args;
00075           throw;
00076         }
00077 
00078         delete[] args;
00079         return *this;
00080       }
00081       ~ChildList() { delete[] m_args; }
00082 
00083       size_t size() const { return m_size; }
00084       NodePtr * args() const { return m_args; }
00085 
00086     private:
00087       size_t m_size;
00088       NodePtr * m_args;
00089     };
00090     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(ChildList) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00091 
00093     struct Choice : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES-2*sizeof(NodePtr)>
00094     {
00095       NodePtr lhs, rhs;
00096       Choice(NodePtr const & lhs_, NodePtr const & rhs_)
00097         : lhs(lhs_), rhs(rhs_)
00098       {}
00099     };
00100     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(Choice) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00101 
00107     struct Fwd : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES-sizeof(NodePtr*)>
00108     {
00109       NodePtr dest;
00110       Fwd(NodePtr const & dest_) : dest(dest_) {}
00111     };
00112     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(Fwd) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00113 
00115     struct Int : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES - sizeof(meta::ValueType<INT>::type)>
00116     { 
00117       typedef meta::ValueType<INT>::type value_type;
00118       value_type value;
00119       Int(meta::ValueType<INT>::type value_) : value(value_) {}
00120     };
00121     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(Int) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00122 
00124     struct Float : Unused<PAYLOAD_BYTES - sizeof(meta::ValueType<FLOAT>::type)>
00125     { 
00126       typedef meta::ValueType<FLOAT>::type value_type;
00127       value_type value;
00128       Float(meta::ValueType<FLOAT>::type value_) : value(value_) {}
00129     };
00130     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(Float) == PAYLOAD_BYTES);
00131   }
00132 }
